content.query:
-- QA
select count(*), count(distinct token) from [appl].[closedclaims_deid_members_t];
-- 500000 83851

select ageatendyear, count(*) from [appl].[closedclaims_deid_members_t]
group by ageatendyear
order by 1;

select gendercode, count(*) from [appl].[closedclaims_deid_members_t]
group by gendercode
order by 1;

select zip3value, count(*) 
from [appl].[closedclaims_deid_members_t] c
    inner join [dim].[zip3_pop_lt_20k_t] z1
        on c.[zip3value] = z1.zip3_from
group by zip3value;

select zip3value, count(*) 
from [appl].[closedclaims_deid_members_t] c
group by zip3value
order by 1;

select case when zip3value in ('', '000') or zip3value is null then zip3value else 'valid' end zip3, count(*) 
from [appl].[closedclaims_deid_members_t] c
group by case when zip3value in ('', '000') or zip3value is null then zip3value else 'valid' end;

select 
    c.token, c.gendercode, c.raceethnicitycode, count(distinct c.zip3value) as cnt_zip3values
from 
    [appl].[closedclaims_deid_members_t] c
group by
    c.token, c.gendercode, c.raceethnicitycode
having count(distinct c.zip3value) > 1;

select [raceethnicitycode], count(*) from [appl].[closedclaims_deid_members_t]
group by raceethnicitycode
order by 1;

select distinct [billingprovidertaxonomycode]
    ,[billingtaxonomyclassification]
    ,[renderingprovidertaxonomycode]
    ,[renderingtaxonomyclassification]
    ,[prescribingprovidertaxonomycode]
    ,[prescribingtaxonomyclassification]
FROM [appl].[closedclaims_deid_claims_t]
where billingprovidertaxonomycode in ('208000000X', '261QA1903X', '261QP2300X');


select distinct  c.[billingprovidertaxonomycode], pt.recode,
	c.billingtaxonomyclassification, pt.recode_classification
from [appl].[closedclaims_deid_claims_t] c
    inner join [dim].[provider_taxonomy_t] pt
        on c.[billingprovidertaxonomycode] = pt.code
where pt.recode in ('208000000X', '261QA1903X', '261QP2300X');

select distinct [code]
    ,[recode]
    ,[recode_classification]
from [dim].[provider_taxonomy_t]
where trim(recode) in ('208000000X', '261QA1903X', '261QP2300X');


select count(*), count(distinct token) from [appl].[closedclaims_deid_claims_t];
-- 7488931 83851
	-- 7,488,931
